info.title: BeamPay Public API
info.description: BeamPay public API (Cloudflare Workers). All responses share the envelope `{ code, msg, data, timestamp }`; `code` is `"0"` on success. Money values in `data` are canonical decimal strings — the client owns display formatting.

bearerAuth.description: Dashboard HMAC token from POST /v1/auth/login. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Valid for 30 days.

proxyAuthHmac.name: signature
proxyAuthHmac.description: INTERNAL / PREVIEW. Service-to-service HMAC-SHA256 over the request, carried in the four fields `timestamp`/`recvWindow`/`salt`/`signature` (query or body). This is the indexer→API relay auth and is NOT a stable merchant-facing scheme — per-merchant webhook signing is the GA design (see the webhooks integration guide).

post.summary: Exchange a wallet signature for a dashboard token

get.summary: Address bound to the current token

post.summary: Register a signed EIP-712 order envelope

get.summary: Refund events for an order (newest first)

post.description: INTERNAL / PREVIEW. v1 echoes the validated body. Auth is the internal proxyAuth HMAC (see security). Per-merchant webhook signing is the GA design — do not build against the proxyAuth fields as a stable merchant contract.
